cheerMessages: Beyond Enhancement failed? No worries, next time will succeed! 💪
Gaia Evolution failure is normal, perseverance wins! 🌟
No luck in badge draw? Keep trying, SSR awaits! 🎖️
Enchant Medal failed? Don't lose hope, luck is coming! ✨
Pearl Combine failed? Experience matters most! 🐟
Enhancement failure is temporary, success is near! 🚀
Gaia Evolution is tough, but persistence makes you king! 👑
Badge pool is deep, but miracles happen! 🌈
Enchant failure is part of growth! 🌱
Pearl Combine needs patience, perfect pearl awaits! 💎
Perseverance prevails! The big fish is just ahead! 🐟
Every cast is hope, keep going! 🎣
Diamonds will come, breakthrough vouchers too! ✨
Be patient, rewards will come! 🌊
Today's effort, tomorrow's gain! 🌟
You're the fishing master! 🎖️
Keep going, you're the best! 💯
Take it slow, resources will grow! 📈
Believe in yourself! 💪
Every effort pays off! 💰
tip1: After adding records, data will be automatically saved to the browser
tip2: Click the "Save to File" button to back up data to a local file
tip3: Click the "Load from File" button to restore previously backed up data
tip4: Back up data regularly to avoid browser data loss
dataSaved: Data has been saved to fishing_income.txt
dataLoaded: Data has been loaded from file
fileFormatError: File format error, cannot load data
syncNote1: This feature is in testing phase and may encounter sync failures.
syncNote2: If network fails, please visit CORS proxy demo page to get temporary access.
